profiles.description: Everyday agent hygiene: skill discovery, planning, quality gate, debugging, parallelism, context management.
profiles.name: Core

skills.description: Meta-skill that helps the agent discover other skills.
skills.fires_when: agent needs to find a skill matching a task description, on first session setup
skills.name: find-skills

skills.description: Creates reusable skill files from workflows demonstrated in the current session.
skills.fires_when: "create a skill", "save this workflow as a skill"
skills.name: skill-creator

skills.description: Structured ideation and clarification before starting open-ended work.
skills.fires_when: any vague request, "help me think through X", before starting anything open-ended
skills.name: brainstorming

skills.description: Interrogates plans and assumptions with adversarial questions before implementation.
skills.fires_when: before any implementation, "ask me questions", "challenge my plan"
skills.name: grill-me

skills.description: Structured symptom-to-root-cause debugging methodology.
skills.fires_when: any bug, test failure, unexpected behavior
skills.name: systematic-debugging

skills.description: Creates structured multi-step plans before touching code or documents.
skills.fires_when: "make a plan", "how should I implement this", before touching code
skills.name: writing-plans

skills.description: Blocks "should work now" completions; forces evidence before success claims.
skills.fires_when: before claiming complete, before commit/PR, after any fix
skills.name: verification-before-completion

skills.description: Structured plan execution with checkpoints; companion to writing-plans.
skills.fires_when: after a plan is made, "execute this plan", "start working on this"
skills.name: executing-plans

skills.description: Context-compaction-safe external runbook; no skills.sh equivalent for this specific compaction-recovery pattern.
skills.fires_when: "create a runbook", "where was I", any 2+ step task, session recovery after compaction
skills.name: workplan
